note: Live from the running OCI battle. delta = attack blocked/detected latency_ms (end-to-end, boundary block is fast; LLM-reaching attacks add ~12s under the Groq free-tier throttle). kappa = remediation latency_ms (orchestrated: green-team poll + HTTP revoke + Docker container restart) — NOT the raw kill primitive (that is cmd/latency's 0.5ms).
